emails.subject: Re: Confidentiality Agreement - - EOL
emails.body: Re: Confidentiality Agreement - EOL Comments: 1) Enron Net Work should probably be EnronOnline, LLC 2) 1. What is a Passport Application? 3) 3. I agreed we wouldn't pass along any details of any bids to ENA employees. I don't know what all of this paragraph entails. Can you shed some light, or should we just ask them to reword it? Dave From: Mark Taylor@ECT on 06/08/2000 05:19 PM
